summary: Iteration 3 frontend Playwright testing complete. All 12 distinct test groups PASS (100%). Verified: (1) welcome streaming steps 0..7 + welcome-ready, (2) /help renders block-help with cmd-link-<name> buttons (recruiter, projects, summary, clear, why-this-candidate confirmed) and clicking cmd-link-recruiter inside /help opens block-recruiter, (3) /pro renders block-notice with data-testid notice-suggestion containing 'Command not found. Did you mean ' + cmd-link-projects + '? Type /help for options.' and the button opens block-projects, (4) /reciter resolves to /recruiter via cmd-link-recruiter inside notice-suggestion (full text observed: 'Command not found. Did you mean /recruiter? Type /help for options.') and clicking opens block-recruiter, (5) Tab autocomplete: /sum + Tab fills to /summary, (6) right-sidebar quick-projects opens block-projects, (7) evidence-runbooks fires /runbooks, (8) /resume streams text containing 'Aveelash Hota' + 'Junior DevOps Engineer' within ~2s and download-resume-pdf triggers a real download with suggested filename aveelash-hota-resume.pdf via jsPDF, (9) card outputs render correct counts: /projects=5 project-card-*, /github=5 repo-*, /interview=10 iq-0..iq-9, /runbooks=7 list-runbooks-*, /labs=6 list-labs-* (NOTE: in a single Playwright session prior /projects invocations are still in scrollback, so the global selector count is N x 5 — this is a test-isolation artifact, not a bug; verified per-block by triggering once each in isolation), (10) regression blocks: /summary, /why-this-candidate, /timeline, /skills, /gaps, /why-hire, /contact all render their testids, (11) /clear resets to single block-welcome with no block-help remaining, (12) Explorer file open: file-resume-md opens file-block-resume.md and streams body containing 'Aveelash Hota'; file-projects-dockerized-app-md opens file-block-projects/dockerized-app.md.
critical_code_review_comments: All iteration-3 data-testids present and correctly wired: cmd-link-<name> in HelpBlock and NoticeBlock, notice-suggestion on the suggestion notice, staggered animation-delay on project/repo/runbook/lab/interview cards, StreamingPre + useTypewriter for textual outputs, cursor-blink span visible while streaming.
suggestCommand() correctly prefers prefix match (/pro -> /projects) then falls back to Levenshtein (/reciter -> /recruiter). Implementation is O(n*m) per command and fine for the ~15-command list.

run-command CustomEvent listener wired in App.useEffect; CmdLink dispatches it correctly. Clicking cmd-links inside any output (help / notice) re-enters runCommand and renders the corresponding block.
Minor (non-blocking): App.js lev() rebuilds dp matrix on every call — fine for current scale (commands list is tiny).

Minor (non-blocking): useTypewriter uses lineMs=14 default and 10 for file bodies; long files (e.g. resume.md ~80 lines) finish in ~1.1s, within the spec's '~1.5s' window. PDF export uses the full resume string directly, independent of streaming state — correct.

Minor (non-blocking, cosmetic): when a user clicks cmd-link-projects from inside an existing /help or notice block, the previously-rendered cards/blocks remain in scrollback (intentional terminal behavior), so global locators like [data-testid^="project-card-"] reflect cumulative counts in a single session. Tests should scope to .last block or trigger a /clear before counting if exact counts are asserted.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend-only app at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://sre-agent.preview.emergentagent.com. All iteration-3 features verified end-to-end with Playwright. Key new selectors: cmd-link-<name> buttons (e.g. cmd-link-recruiter, cmd-link-projects, cmd-link-summary, cmd-link-clear, cmd-link-why-this-candidate) appear both inside block-help and inside block-notice when a suggestion is offered; the suggestion notice itself has data-testid=notice-suggestion. Streaming uses 14ms/line for normal output and 10ms/line for file bodies — wait ~1.5-2s after triggering /resume or large file open before asserting full text. /reciter -> /recruiter confirmed via Levenshtein fallback. Card counts: per single invocation projects=5, github=5, interview=10, runbooks=7, labs=6 — when counting card testids globally in a long session, use .last block scoping or /clear first. PDF download via jsPDF still works (aveelash-hota-resume.pdf).
rca of the issue: No bugs detected. The only superficial 'failure' in the test run ('project cards expected 5 got 15') was a test-isolation artifact: three earlier interactions in the same session opened /projects (via /pro suggestion click, quick-projects click, and an explicit /projects), leaving 3 x 5 = 15 project-card-* nodes in the terminal scrollback. Functionality is correct.
